description: Tests dirty form tracking and navigation blocking with native and custom component inputs

browserSteps.value: === SETUP: Wait for page and form to be ready ===
Wait for deferred snapshot (custom element whenDefined + 2 rAF ticks)
=== SETUP: Register hook listeners ===

window.__hookLog = []; piko.hooks.on('form:dirty', function(p) { window.__hookLog.push('dirty:' + (p.formId || '')); document.getElementById('hook-log').textContent = window.__hookLog.join(','); }); piko.hooks.on('form:clean', function(p) { window.__hookLog.push('clean:' + (p.formId || '')); document.getElementById('hook-log').textContent = window.__hookLog.join(','); });
=== TEST 1: Clean form navigation - no dialog, navigation succeeds ===
window.__confirmCalled = false; window.confirm = function(msg) { window.__confirmCalled = true; document.getElementById('status').textContent = 'confirm-called'; return false; };
piko.nav.navigate('/other');
=== Navigate back to form page via hard navigation ===
/form
Wait for form re-tracking after hard navigation
Re-register hook listeners (JS context was destroyed by hard navigation)

window.__hookLog = []; piko.hooks.on('form:dirty', function(p) { window.__hookLog.push('dirty:' + (p.formId || '')); document.getElementById('hook-log').textContent = window.__hookLog.join(','); }); piko.hooks.on('form:clean', function(p) { window.__hookLog.push('clean:' + (p.formId || '')); document.getElementById('hook-log').textContent = window.__hookLog.join(','); });
=== TEST 2: Dirty native input - dialog appears, navigation blocked ===
changed
=== TEST 3: Verify form:dirty hook fired for native input ===
=== TEST 3b: Verify form:dirty hook registered in <script lang=ts> also fired ===
Override confirm to return false (block navigation) and attempt soft nav
document.getElementById('status').textContent = ''; window.confirm = function(msg) { document.getElementById('status').textContent = 'confirm:' + msg; return false; };
piko.nav.navigate('/other');

browserSteps.expected: confirm:You have unsaved changes. Leave anyway?

browserSteps.value: === TEST 4: Revert native input - form:clean hook fires ===
window.__hookLog = []; document.getElementById('hook-log').textContent = '';
=== TEST 5: Dirty component input - dialog appears, navigation blocked ===
window.__hookLog = []; document.getElementById('hook-log').textContent = '';
Fill the component shadow DOM input directly
component-changed
Verify form:dirty hook fired for component input change
document.getElementById('status').textContent = ''; window.confirm = function(msg) { document.getElementById('status').textContent = 'confirm:' + msg; return false; };
piko.nav.navigate('/other');

browserSteps.expected: confirm:You have unsaved changes. Leave anyway?

browserSteps.value: Revert component input to clean the form
=== TEST 6: Both inputs dirty - dialog appears, navigation blocked ===
both-native
both-component
document.getElementById('status').textContent = ''; window.confirm = function(msg) { document.getElementById('status').textContent = 'confirm:' + msg; return false; };
piko.nav.navigate('/other');

browserSteps.expected: confirm:You have unsaved changes. Leave anyway?

browserSteps.value: === TEST 7: Dirty form - accept confirm - navigation proceeds ===
document.getElementById('status').textContent = ''; window.confirm = function(msg) { document.getElementById('status').textContent = 'confirm:' + msg; return true; };
piko.nav.navigate('/other');
